trans-unit.source: The following agent configurations use the deprecated 'mcp start' command. Update them?
trans-unit.target: Les configurations d’agent suivantes utilisent la commande « mcp start » obsolète. Voulez-vous les mettre à jour ?

trans-unit.source: Run 'aspire agent init' to update configuration
trans-unit.target: Exécutez « aspire agent init » pour mettre à jour la configuration

trans-unit.source: Update {0} config to use new 'agent mcp' command
trans-unit.target: Mettre à jour {0} la configuration pour utiliser la nouvelle commande « agent mcp »
{0} configuration utilise la commande « mcp start » dépréciée
Gérer les intégrations des agents IA.
Install Aspire MCP server

trans-unit.source: Initialize agent environment configuration for detected agents
trans-unit.target: Initialiser la configuration de l’environnement des agents détectés.
Install Aspire skill file (Recommended)

trans-unit.source: No options selected. Nothing to configure.
trans-unit.target: No options selected. Nothing to configure.
(configures detected agent environments)
Failed to install {0} skill at {1}: {2}.
Installed Playwright CLI.
Installed {0} skill ({1}).

trans-unit.source: Playwright CLI requires npm, which was not found on PATH. Skipping installation.
trans-unit.target: Playwright CLI requires npm, which was not found on PATH. Skipping installation.

trans-unit.source: Aspire CLI commands and workflows for distributed apps
trans-unit.target: Aspire CLI commands and workflows for distributed apps

trans-unit.source: Query .NET API surfaces across NuGet packages and platform libraries
trans-unit.target: Query .NET API surfaces across NuGet packages and platform libraries
Browser automation and functional testing
Required for Claude Code
Claude Code (.claude/skills/)

trans-unit.source: Legacy location for GitHub Copilot skills
trans-unit.target: Legacy location for GitHub Copilot skills
VS Code / GitHub Copilot (.github/skills/)
Legacy location for OpenCode skills
OpenCode (.opencode/skill/)

trans-unit.source: Supported by VS Code, GitHub Copilot, and OpenCode (also installs at ~/)
trans-unit.target: Supported by VS Code, GitHub Copilot, and OpenCode (also installs at ~/)
Standard (.agents/skills/)

trans-unit.source: Where should skill files be installed? [dim](Space to toggle, Enter to confirm)[/]
trans-unit.target: Where should skill files be installed? [dim](Space to toggle, Enter to confirm)[/]

trans-unit.source: Which skills should be installed? [dim](Space to toggle, Enter to confirm)[/]
trans-unit.target: Which skills should be installed? [dim](Space to toggle, Enter to confirm)[/]

trans-unit.source: What would you like to configure? [dim](Enter to skip, Ctrl+C to cancel)[/]
trans-unit.target: What would you like to configure? [dim](Enter to skip, Ctrl+C to cancel)[/]

trans-unit.source: The configuration file '{0}' contains malformed JSON. Please fix the file manually and re-run the command.
trans-unit.target: The configuration file '{0}' contains malformed JSON. Please fix the file manually and re-run the command.

trans-unit.source: Start the MCP (Model Context Protocol) server
trans-unit.target: Démarrez le serveur MCP (Model Context Protocol).
None — skip
Skipping update of '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Configuration completed with errors. Please fix the reported issues and re-run the command.
trans-unit.target: Configuration completed with errors. Please fix the reported issues and re-run the command.
